features: EC9B In-Ear Stereo MP3 Mobile PC EarPhones Black
description: Product Description In-ear Stereo Earphones These stereo earphones combine a lightweight design, premium sound quality, and maximum comfort. The earbuds are made from soft silicone, ensuring a perfect and comfortable fit. Suitable for a wide variety of audio devices. PRODUCT FEATURES: - Fitted with 10mmØ super bass ferrite magnetic drivers - Produce clear and full sound - 1.2m lead with a 3.5mm stereo jack plug - Spare earbuds included SPECIFICATIONS: - Lead length 1.2m - Power 100mW - Connector 3.5mm stereo jack - Speaker size 10mmØ - Frequency response 20Hz-20kHz - Impedance 32 Ohms - Sensitivity 98dB @ 1kHz - Dimensions 22 x 9 x 129mm - Weight 42g Box Contains 1 x Stereo In-ear earphones
